mapper.select: SELECT SEQ , ID , TITLE , REF , STEP , DEPTH , REGDATE, DELFLAG, NAME FROM ANSWERBOARD a JOIN MEMBER m USING(ID) ORDER BY REF DESC, STEP ASC
SELECT SEQ, ID, TITLE, REF, STEP, DEPTH, REGDATE, DELFLAG, NAME FROM ANSWERBOARD a JOIN MEMBER m USING(ID) ORDER BY REF DESC, STEP ASC OFFSET #{offSet} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
